# Heat Maps Submodule

This submodule retrieves heat map data for a Traffic Manager Profile.

**Note:** Heat Maps are read-only resources automatically generated by Azure Traffic Manager. They provide latency and traffic volume data visualized geographically.

Heat Maps are useful for understanding user distribution, traffic patterns, and endpoint responsiveness from different regions.

## Usage

```hcl
module "heat_map" {
  source = "../../modules/heatmaps"

  traffic_manager_profile_id = azapi_resource.traffic_manager_profile.id
}

output "heat_map_data" {
  value = module.heat_map.heat_map_data
}
```

## Notes

- Heat maps are automatically generated when Traffic View is enabled on the Traffic Manager profile
- The heat map name is always "default"
- This module retrieves existing data; it does not create or modify heat maps
